title: Nachash #5176
definition:
Nahash = "serpent"

 n pr m
 1) a king of the Ammonites during the time of king Saul
 2) the father of Abigail, the mother of Amasa, the commander of
    Absalom's army
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nahash = "serpent"

 n pr m
 1) a king of the Ammonites during the time of king Saul
 2) the father of Abigail, the mother of Amasa, the commander of
    Absalom's army

    NASB:  the name of several non-Isr.
